summary: Round-1 frontend intent audit of Procurement + Inventory portals as SUPER_ADMIN (admin@torado.id). All routes render without crashes. Several genuine intent-correctness bugs found, dominated by an inventory valuation/cost-display defect that propagates across many pages (Total Value shows Rp 0 even when qty>0 and last_cost>0). Movements lists show item UUIDs instead of item names. Vendor Scorecard total value is Rp 0 despite 45 Received POs.

ui_bugs.component: InventoryHome /inventory (KPI + Recent Movements + Valuation per Outlet)
ui_bugs.issue: TOTAL INVENTORY VALUE = Rp 0; Valuation per Outlet shows Rp 0 for all 5 outlets; Recent Movements list shows item UUID (e.g. '5083fcef-dcd6-462d-...') instead of item name; per-outlet card headers show outlet UUID instead of outlet name

'Total Value' column = Rp 0 for EVERY row, even rows with positive Qty and non-zero Last Cost (e.g. Daging Sapi Has Dalam @ Calluna: qty=18, last_cost=Rp 60.523, but Total Value=Rp 0). Total Value should be qty * last_cost.
Item column displays UUID instead of item name. Unit Cost & Total Cost = Rp 0 for ALL rows including purchase_receive movements (should inherit GR unit cost).

TOTAL INVENTORY VALUE shows Rp 0. ITEM COUNT (QTY>0) = 16 but total = 0. Per-outlet all Rp 0. INTENT VIOLATION: page is supposed to show qty*cost reconciling with GL Inventory (~Rp 1.126M); current display would mislead users into thinking inventory is worthless.
All 39 transfers show Total Value Rp 0 (same Altero->Bakkies, 1 line each). Even after transfers move stock, value column never reflects item cost.
All 42 adjustments show Total Value Rp 0; same reason 'Opname' on every row (seed monotony) and zero valuation regardless of item cost.

Total Value = Rp 0 for ALL 6 vendors despite 45 Received POs (Toko Sayur, CV Daging Berkah, etc each have multiple POs with totals shown elsewhere). PO Count and Score render correctly; only Total Value aggregation is broken.
Date stamp on every PO card reads '13 Jun 2026' (likely 'today') instead of the PO order date that PO List correctly shows (e.g. PO-DEMO-0045 = 10 Jun 2026 on list but 13 Jun 2026 here).

All KPI counters = 0 and table shows 'Belum ada data price intelligence. Buat PO atau GR terlebih dahulu agar data vendor terupdate.' — but 45 POs and 38 GRs already exist. Either the aggregation job hasn't been triggered or the lookup query is wrong; this is likely a real bug, not an empty seed.

49 items flagged Critical with NEGATIVE qty (e.g. Ayam Fillet Dada @ Altero qty=-59). Indicates initial-stock / opening-balance seed is missing OR sales/wastage events were posted without prior purchase_receive bringing stock in. Not a UI bug per se but suggests data integrity issue worth flagging upstream.

Rows do NOT carry data-testid='pr-row-{id}' / 'po-row-{id}' / 'gr-row-{id}' that DataTable.jsx pattern documents. These lists still use the older table component, so automated row-click tests cannot find rows by testid. Detail navigation works via 'Detail' link only.

issues: Showing raw UUIDs in a user-facing list is a UX defect — should resolve to item_name. Same column repeats for all 20 visible rows making the list non-actionable for auditors.
Outlet identifiers shown as UUIDs instead of outlet names (Calluna, Bakkies, etc.)
All 39 rows are Altero->Bakkies / 1 line / Rp 0 — high seed monotony; consider varied seed for realistic UX.

action_items: Fix inventory valuation propagation: ensure movements API returns unit_cost/total_cost (currently 0) AND stock balance computes total_value = qty * last_cost. Suspect inventory_service.compute_balance is not joining cost or item cost is 0 in master data.
Resolve item_id -> item.name and outlet_id -> outlet.name in /inventory and /inventory/movements responses (or on FE serializer).
Vendor Scorecard: aggregate sum(po.grand_total) per vendor (currently Rp 0); 45 POs exist.
PO Comparison: replace card date with po.order_date (currently rendering current date).
Price Intelligence: trigger/repair aggregation job — page should populate now that PO+GR exist.
Investigate negative on-hand qty across 49 stock-balance rows — likely missing opening-balance seed; either back-seed initial purchase_receive or block sale postings when stock<=0.
Add data-testid=pr-row-{id}/po-row-{id}/gr-row-{id} to PR/PO/GR list rows to align with DataTable pattern from /app/frontend/src/components/shared/DataTable.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Inventory valuation is the single biggest correctness blocker; once cost data flows from purchase_receive movements into the running cost (moving avg / last_cost) used by /balance and /valuation, six downstream pages will fix themselves.

Mixing UUID-as-display in production lists (movements, recent movements card, valuation cards) suggests the inventory router/service serializers strip out the lookup join. Either denormalize at write-time or add item/outlet $lookup in aggregation pipeline.
PR/PO/GR list pages should migrate to shared DataTable.jsx so testability (data-testid row pattern) + uniform sort/pagination is honored.

success_rate.frontend: Render: 100%; Intent-correctness: ~60% (10 of ~25 audited views show wrong/missing data)

test_credentials: admin@torado.id / Torado@2026 (SUPER_ADMIN) — login OK via login-email/login-password/login-submit.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing demo DB. Observed counts: 102 PRs / 45 POs (all Received) / 38-43 GRs / 39 Transfers / 42 Adjustments / 13 items in catalog (16 reported as qty>0 by inventory home — discrepancy worth noting) / 6 vendors / 5 outlets.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round-2 should re-audit Inventory (valuation, balance, movements, valuation-per-outlet, vendor-scorecard) after the cost-propagation fix. Also confirm UUIDs replaced by names in /inventory home Recent Movements card. Procurement happy-path renders correctly — focus retest on Price Intelligence, Vendor Scorecard, PO Comparison dates. PR/PO list rows still need data-testid row pattern for future Playwright scripts.

kanban.card_distribution: PR Draft 0 / PR Pending 87 / PR Approved 6 / PO Sent 0 / PO Received 45 (138 total)

inventory_home.BUG: Rp 0 across all outlets despite 38 GRs; Recent Movements shows item UUIDs

stock_valuation.BUG_intent_violation: Page misleads — should show ~Rp 1.126M per GL or at minimum non-zero

low_stock.DATA_ISSUE: all 49 items have negative qty — missing opening balance seed

rca of the issue: The inventory valuation defect is the dominant root cause. Movements API returns unit_cost=0 for purchase_receive movements; downstream services (balance.total_value, valuation page, vendor scorecard total, transfer value, adjustment value) all multiply by 0 -> Rp 0 everywhere. Likely fix points: (a) services/inventory_service.py when posting a purchase_receive must record movement.unit_cost from the GR line; (b) compute_balance should set total_value = qty * last_cost; (c) the movements serializer must $lookup item_name + outlet_name OR the FE must resolve IDs from a local cache. Secondary issues (vendor scorecard total, price intelligence empty, PO comparison date) are independent and need their own fixes.
